ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithm_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the algorithm (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was left */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)
column_names: ID of the user who left the rating
